query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "measuring epistemic resilience of llms under misleading medical contex" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on improving medical LLM performance through multi-agent collaboration and intent resolution to reduce hallucinations, which is a system-design solution rather than an empirical study measuring the specific mechanism of "epistemic resilience" under misleading contexts.
